project_title: HR Policy Rollout Using Google Docs / Notion

steps.q: A report says “I’m being targeted.” First response?

options.text: Ask them to confront the peer
Loop in whole team for context

steps.q: Order the pieces to set a leadership-safe check-in line.

Subject: Next steps on your concern

Thanks for flagging this—I'm taking it seriously.

Today I will: ensure safety + limit sharing to need-to-know.

Next check-in: [A] [B] [C]

pieces: with what we know + next steps
